# CodingAnthem

> Fast, free developer tools for your browser and AI workflows.

CodingAnthem is a collection of free, browser-based developer utilities built for developers and AI-assisted workflows. All tools run entirely client-side — no data is sent to a server. No sign-up required.

## Tools

- JSON Formatter — format, validate, and minify JSON: /tools/json-formatter
- Base64 Encoder / Decoder — encode and decode text to and from Base64: /tools/base64
- UUID Generator — generate version 4 UUIDs instantly: /tools/uuid-generator
- Password Generator — create strong, random passwords with custom rules: /tools/password-generator
- Hash Generator — compute MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 checksums: /tools/hash-generator
- Unix Timestamp Converter — convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates: /tools/timestamp-converter
- Color Converter — translate colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats: /tools/color-converter
- Regex Tester — test regular expressions with live match results: /tools/regex-tester
- Case Converter — switch between camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, and more: /tools/case-converter
- Text Diff — compare two blocks of text and highlight what changed: /tools/text-diff

## About

- All tools are free and require no account or sign-up.
- All processing happens in the browser using JavaScript and Web APIs.
- No data is transmitted to any server.
- Built with Next.js and React.
- Source: https://github.com/RahulGo8u/codinganthem
